name: Beyond scalar losses: calibrating segmentation models via gradient vector field surgery
summary: arXiv:2607.14338v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Region-based loss functions, such as the Dice loss, have established themselves as the de facto standard for highly class- and region-imbalanced se...
description: arXiv:2607.14338v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Region-based loss functions, such as the Dice loss, have established themselves as the de facto standard for highly class- and region-imbalanced segmentation tasks. However, models trained using region-based loss functions are notoriously miscalibrated and typically yield over-confident predictions. In medical imaging applications, such as defin...
author: Laurin Lux, Alexander H. Berger, Moritz Knolle, Daniel R\"uckert, Johannes C. Paetzold
